name: Brunch Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet. Add ham and onion; sauté until onions are translucent.
2. Stir in eggs and cook over low heat until just set, stirring gently to avoid scrambling.
3. In a small pan, melt butter. Whisk in flour; gradually whisk in milk, cooking until thickened.
4. Season the sauce with salt and pepper as desired.
5. Heat tortillas on a griddle until they are soft and flexible but not burned.
6. Divide the egg mixture evenly among three tortillas.
7. Roll each tortilla tightly around the filling.
8. Spoon white sauce over the enchiladas and sprinkle cheese on top.
9. Serve with salsa on the side.
